arts.ttl: Man United explore 'shock' Marcus Rashford swap deal that could harm Liverpool's transfer plans
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly give consideration to an audacious Marcus Rashford swap transfer which could also have an impact on Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot could miss Liverpool title party as Reds boss makes Leicester admission
arts.sum: Liverpool can seal the Premier League title on Sunday if Arsenal lose against Ipswich and Arne Slot's side beat Leicester, an outcome which will no-doubt lead to Bank Holiday celebrations

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hits back at pundits over Liverpool opinion and aims subtle jibe at Man City
arts.sum: Arne Slot accepts that pundits can have an opinion on whether the standard of the top-flight in England has fallen during a season which has seen his team turn the title race into a procession

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals his thoughts on Liverpool's Premier League title celebrations - and sends message to critics who claim the competition is WEAKER this season
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL: If Arsenal lose to Ipswich and Liverpool go on to beat Leicester, Slot's side will secure the league with five games to go but Slot is planning to travel to Holland on Monday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star closes on Mo Salah after performance vs Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha closed the gap on Liverpool star Mohamed Salah in an altogether noteworthy statistical category on Saturday. This came by way of his efforts in Barca’s La Liga…

arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. Liverpool injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Liverpool given five-man shortlist to replace Trent Alexander-Arnold as transfer plan clear
arts.sum: All the latest Liverpool news as Arne Slot gears up for a busy summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Leicester - Premier League
arts.sum: How Liverpool could line up for their Premier League clash with Leicester on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Chelsea Maresca SACK TRUTH, Arsenal DEAL CLOSE, Liverpool SELL Nunez
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Chelsea Maresca SACK TRUTH, Arsenal DEAL CLOSE, Liverpool SELL Nunez Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Enzo Maresca, Myles Lewis-Skelly and Darwin Nunez .
